3238900.name: QuattroPanicu
3238900.description:
Get ready for chaotic fun!
A brain-busting challenge wrapped in cute characters? Here comes a brutally difficult puzzle game!

This game is a simple action-puzzle where you control four adorable characters to guide them to the goal in each stage.
However, you must control all the characters at the same time with a single controller.

“I wanted to move this one, but that one moved instead!”
“My brain gets it, but my fingers just won’t follow!”
You’ll likely find it way harder than you imagine, leaving you squirming in frustration!

What’s important is:
  • Quickly figuring out which button controls which character!
  • Accurately guiding each character to the goal!

So, if you're confident in your brain and controller skills, why not put them to the test with this game?

*This game is recommended to be played with a controller, but keyboard controls are also supported.
